title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham family as a Senior Teacher in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!
